name: skill-x
description: A composable collection of agent skills: rigor, delegation, mechanistic interpretability, and self-evolution.
author: anshmajumdar

scripts.lint:skill: node "$(mavis skill show skill-creator 2>/dev/null | python3 -c 'import json,sys;print(json.load(sys.stdin)["location"])' 2>/dev/null | xargs dirname)/scripts/lint-skill.js"
